text:
There once was a squirrel named Willow. She lived in a forest full of leaves and vines. Willow loved to play. One sunny day, she climbed up a tall cherry tree to have a bird's eye view.

She searched for nuts. She found some. She flew down. Then she chased her shadow.

Afternoon came. Willow felt tired. She climbed down slowly.

She buried nuts. She sniffed around. Nothing.

Tonight she'd hunt owl feathers. They made yummy noise.

She gathered sticks. She made a snare.

Late night. No owl. She saw sparkles.

She peered. Owls! No fear.

She snatched one feather.

Sleepy. Dream.

Oranges glow.

Stars watch.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
